☠ Dark Fortress
🗺 Choose Your Realm
🗺 Middle Earth
0/20 Conquered
⚔️ Choose Your Dungeon
Each dungeon grows harder with each floor. Survive to the last floor to face the boss.
🪦 Cemetery of the Damned
Floors: 3   Difficulty: Normal   Required: Lv.1
Ancient burial grounds crawling with cultists and risen dead. The wight lord guards the deepest crypt.
Enemies: Cultists · Skeletons · Zombies · Ghouls · Gravediggers
🌲 Haunted Forest
Floors: 4   Difficulty: Hard   Required: Lv.3
A cursed woodland where witches commune with the dead and skeletal wolves stalk between the roots.
Enemies: Forest Wolves · Witches · Treants · Banshees
🔒 Requires Level 3
☠ Lich's Sanctum
Floors: 5   Difficulty: Extreme   Required: Lv.6
The Lich's fortress. Death knights, shadow demons, and lich acolytes protect the phylactery chamber.
Enemies: Death Knights · Lich Acolytes · Shadow Demons · Wraiths
🔒 Requires Level 6
